stories.title: Argentina show they can win without Messi but, eve...
stories.summary: Argentina found success against Jordan without Lionel Messi, but the 38-year-old still made an impact off the bench to extend his goal record.

stories.title: Mercury's Tibbetts rips WNBA after Thomas ruling
stories.summary: Phoenix Mercury coach Nate Tibbetts called out the WNBA and defended his star player, Alyssa Thomas, before his team's 89-80 win over the Toronto Tempo on Saturday, days after Thomas was suspended for a play involving Indiana Fever guard Caitlin Clark.

stories.title: Algeria and Austria's dramatic draw sends Iran out...
stories.summary: Austria and Algeria played to a thrilling 3-3 draw Saturday night in what amounted to a win-win result in their World Cup group stage finale, allowing both to advance to the knockout round while eliminating Iran from the tournament.

stories.title: Ennis drops Zayas 3 times in dazzling title victor...
stories.summary: Jaron "Boots" Ennis scored an emphatic victory over Xander Zayas on Saturday night, stopping Zayas in the seventh round to become the new WBO and WBA junior middleweight champion.

stories.title: Aiyuk blames ex-agent for causing 49ers issues
stories.summary: Brandon Aiyuk said in a YouTube video that his former agent has influenced the ongoing situation between him and 49ers and that general manager John Lynch recently showed up at his house.
